case_title: RASDAS, VIRGILIO M. JR. VS DHARMA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RASDAS, VIRGILIO M. JR. AS TO DEFENDANT DHARMA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC. CENTURY SCAFFOLDING CONSTRUCTION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO BARRY KHAN, AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR DHARMA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-31-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-09-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF IS TO SERVE DEFENDANT CENTURY SCAFFOLDING.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RASDAS, VIRGILIO M. JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DHARMA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC. CENTURY SCAFFOLDING CONSTRUCTION, INC. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,595.00, DEFENDANT CENTURY SCAFFOLDING CONSTRUCTION, INC. APPEARS AT TRIAL AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. THE COURT ALLOCATES LIABILITY 50% TO DEFENDANT DHARMA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC. AND 50% TO CENTURY SCAFFOLDING CONSTRUCTION, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO YOUNG LEE AUTHORIZED AGT FOR CENTURY SCAFFOLDING CONSTRUCTION.
